overview: A cinematic, dark-themed professional portfolio for Md Abdullah Hosen — Expert WordPress Developer & Frontend Engineer. Features animated hero, skill bars, services grid, project showcase, timeline, and contact form.
features: Cinematic dark theme with gold/electric blue accents
Animated hero with particle background and typing effect
Sticky sidebar profile card (desktop) / top header (mobile)
Services cards grid with hover effects
Portfolio project showcase with category filtering
Vertical experience timeline with stagger animations
Smooth scroll navigation with active section highlight
